productDisplayName: Timex Men Cream Toned Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel circular caseDial style: Cream toned dial with branding below the 12 hour mark, has black hands with white inlay, and black markingsFeatures: Three chronograph displays on the dial and screw to reset timeStrap style: Brown, textured leather strap with a tang claspWater resistant upto 50 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year from the date of purchase
